/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_pde_solver.dir/tests/test_pde_solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pde_solver.dir/PDEs/PDE.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pde_solver.dir/PDEs/Grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pde_solver.dir/PDEs/BoundaryConditions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pde_solver.dir/PDEs/Solver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pde_solver.dir/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_pde_solver.dir/InterpolationSchemes.cpp.o -o test_pde_solver  lib/libgtest_main.a lib/libgtest.a
